ddls:
CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "time_valid" TEXT /* Status of the time mark (Valid or Not Valid) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the entry (1993 and beyond) */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the entry (1-12) */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the entry (1-31) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the entry (HH:MM:SS format) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system of the data entry */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score (0.0 - 1.0) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valid_entry_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the count entry */,
  "valid_count" INTEGER /* Number of valid entries on the report date */,
  "invalid_count" INTEGER /* Number of invalid entries on the report date */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_entries" INTEGER /* Total number of entries (valid + invalid) on the report date */,
  "reprocessed_count" INTEGER /* Number of entries that were reprocessed */,
  "revalidation_count" INTEGER /* Number of entries that were revalidated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "field_description" TEXT /* Description of the field (e.g., Time Mark Valid) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units for the field (if applicable) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format for the field (e.g., Char, Int, HH:MM:SS) */,
  "value_range" TEXT /* Range of acceptable values for the field */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_metadata_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
